description: This test case verifies side panel navigation, and partial url mapping
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "<title>" option within the side nav
Then the user should be taken to the "<title>" page
And the browser url should contain "<partial_url>"Examples:
|*title*|*partial_url*|
|BTC Tools|/btc-tools|
|Overrides|/overrides/session|
|Blackout Override|/ip-override|
|Logger|/logger|
|Media Validation|/media-validation|
|Milestones|/milestones|
|Audit & Logging|/audits|
|Partner Delivery|/partner/mapping|
|ESNI Management|/esni/media|
|User Lookup|/user-lookup|
